     the Fermi energy is    -0.6418 ev

!    total energy              =   -6581.01354077 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          7.1E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26439784 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -137682.24178201 Ry
